scenario.name: S9 REGISTER probe
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 60 User-Agent: SIPp-S9-register-probe Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 60 [authentication] User-Agent: SIPp-S9-register-probe Content-Length: 0
